Destination Intelligence

Travel Discovery Meets Investment Intelligence

AI-powered intelligence modules eliminating uncertainty in every luxury travel and investment decision.

Luxury Index Engine

Ranks every premium land category globally — private islands, hidden beaches, jungle estates. AI evaluates 40+ quality signals per location in real time.

IslandsBeachesHidden CavesJungle

Climate Risk Engine

8-vector climate model: flood, sea-level rise, storm frequency, wildfire exposure, monsoon patterns, and long-term climate trends for any parcel on Earth.

Flood RiskSea LevelStormsWildfire

Investment Potential

ValuePredict™ AI forecasts 3–10 year appreciation using satellite change detection, tourism demand, infrastructure pipelines, and eco-tourism growth trends.

ROI ForecastTourism DemandComparables

Weather Intelligence

Hyper-local real-time weather fused with 50-year climate records. Understand monsoon timing, dry seasons, wave patterns, and year-round livability scores.

Real-TimeHistoricalSeasonalMonsoon
✦ Powered by 12 Institutional Sources

Backed by the World's Most Trusted Data Sources

GeoLux AI synthesises 40+ live data streams from 12 verified institutional sources — NASA, NOAA, IPCC AR6, World Bank, UNWTO, and more.

🛰️
NASA Earth Observatory
MODIS, Landsat & Sentinel satellite imagery · Sea Surface Temperature (GHRSST) · Coastal Elevation (SRTM) · 50+ year historical archive. NASA confirmation: sea level rising at 3.6mm/yr globally (satellite altimetry).
🌋
NASA / USGS Volcano Hazards
Global Volcanism Program integration · USGS HVO real-time monitoring · InSAR ground deformation data for all tracked volcanic systems.
🌊
NOAA Climate
Ocean temperature, sea-level rise projections & hurricane track data
🌡️
IPCC AR6 Models
Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change 6th Assessment baseline projections
📡
ESA Copernicus
European Space Agency land use, coastal change & vegetation density tracking
🏛️
World Bank Data
Legal frameworks, foreign investment laws & sovereign risk indices per country
🗺️
OpenStreetMap + Esri
Real-time base mapping, satellite imagery & geospatial parcel intelligence
🔬
GBIF Marine Data
Global Biodiversity Information — marine ecosystem health & protected area mapping

Process

Land Intelligence in 4 Steps

From search to actionable luxury land intelligence in under 10 minutes.

01
Search or Explore Map

Search any location or use our interactive map to discover hidden beaches, caves, and islands — including spots no broker knows about.

02
AI Analyzes 40+ Signals

Satellite imagery, climate models, legal databases, monsoon patterns, tourism indices — all processed simultaneously by our intelligence engine.

03
Full Report Generated

Safety, Climate Risk, Investment Potential, Legal Clarity, ESG rating, and weather intelligence — all in one premium structured report.

04
Invest with Certainty

Download, share with advisors, and make the most confident land acquisition of your life — backed by AI data, not instinct.

✦ SAMPLE REPORT PREVIEW

What Your Report Contains

Every GeoLux report is custom-built for your specific target. Here is what a full Intelligence Report delivers.

🗺️

PARCEL & BUILD ZONE ANALYSIS

Satellite-derived boundary mapping, buildable land calculation, topography grading, access routes, coastal setback compliance, and visual zone overlays for your exact parcel.

SATELLITE GIS MAPPING
⚖️

LEGAL TITLE & OWNERSHIP FRAMEWORK

Foreign ownership rules, leasehold vs freehold structures, title deed status, encumbrance checks, government acquisition risk, and jurisdiction-specific legal pathways for acquisition.

WORLD BANK LEGAL REVIEW
🌡️

CLIMATE RISK MATRIX

30-year sea level rise projections, cyclone/hurricane historical track analysis, flood zone classification, heat stress indices, and IPCC AR6 scenario modelling specific to your target coordinates.

NOAA IPCC AR6 NASA
📈

MARKET & INVESTMENT INTELLIGENCE

Tourism growth trends, luxury villa rental yield benchmarks, comparable land transaction data, infrastructure pipeline, local GDP trajectory, and a proprietary GeoLux Investment Score™ (0–100).

MARKET DATA AI SCORING
🏗️

DEVELOPMENT FEASIBILITY

Construction cost benchmarks, local contractor availability, utility/grid access, resort permit pathways, environmental compliance requirements, and phased development scenarios for your project type.

FEASIBILITY ESA COPERNICUS
📞

PRIVATE ANALYST BRIEFING

Every premium report includes a 30-minute private video or call briefing with a GeoLux senior analyst to walk through findings, answer questions, and discuss acquisition strategy in confidence.

INCLUDED PREMIUM TIER

✦ Investment Intelligence That Pays For Itself

Why This Report Matters

Every serious investor who skipped due diligence paid for it later. GeoLux reports exist so you don't have to learn these lessons the expensive way.

📈
Identify Real ROI Before You Commit
Our AI analyses tourism trajectory, luxury villa yield benchmarks, comparable land transactions, and infrastructure pipelines to give you a clear picture of expected returns — not broker promises.
3–5×
Avg. ROI multiple on top-ranked locations
🛡️
Avoid Costly Hidden Risks
Sea-level encroachment. Flood zones. Tidal mapping errors your local lawyers missed. Legal title irregularities. Climate degradation timelines. We surface what others don't look for — before you wire funds.
$2.4M
Avg. cost of acquiring a wrong-zoned parcel
🧠
Make Smart Decisions with Real Data
Not gut feel. Not a broker's sales pitch. 40+ live data streams — NASA satellite imagery, IPCC climate models, World Bank legal frameworks, NOAA ocean data — synthesised into one actionable report.
40+
Data sources per location report
⚡
Act Before the Window Closes
The best island and coastal locations are acquired quietly — by family offices, developers, and funds who move on intelligence, not listings. Once a market tips, pricing doubles in 24 months. GeoLux puts you ahead of the curve.
24hr

✦ Institutional Intelligence Layer

Every Report. Institutional Grade.
Seven Intelligence Modules.

GeoLux AI delivers the same depth of analysis used by sovereign wealth funds, resort developers, and family offices — without the $50K consultant fee.

🛰️
Satellite Parcel Analysis
NASA Sentinel-2 and Landsat imagery analysis of your exact parcel. Vegetation health, coastal erosion, terrain slope, flood plain identification, and land-use change detection.
✦ Included in all reports
⚖️
Legal Due Diligence
Foreign ownership laws, freehold vs. leasehold structures, environmental protection zone status, title encumbrance checks, and acquisition pathway guidance by jurisdiction.
✦ Included in all reports
🏗️
Development Feasibility
Zoning compliance, construction cost benchmarks, utility access, environmental permits, height restriction mapping, and resort concept viability analysis (50–200 keys).
✦ Premium & above
📈
ROI Benchmarking
ValuePredict™ AI-driven 3–10 year appreciation modelling. Comparable land transaction analysis. Tourism yield forecasting. Capital growth probability ranges with IPCC-adjusted risk discounting.
✦ Included in all reports
💧
Market Liquidity Analysis
Transaction volume by parcel type, days-on-market averages, buyer nationality breakdown, distressed asset frequency, and exit pathway assessment for each target market.
✦ Intelligence & above
🏨
Hospitality Demand Forecasting
RevPAR benchmarking, ADR trends, luxury segment occupancy rates, operator landscape mapping, brand positioning opportunities, and international travel demand projections (UNWTO-sourced).
✦ Developer tier
📊
Tourism Growth Metrics
International visitor arrivals, luxury segment growth rate, repeat visitation patterns, infrastructure investment signals, UHNW traveller origin tracking, and emerging market demand forecasting.
✦ Included in all reports

Data Integrity

Why Trust GeoLux AI?

Institutional-grade intelligence powered by verified global datasets and AI-enhanced analysis.

AI Enhanced

The Problem We Were Built to Solve

Why GeoLux AI Exists

Every week, somewhere in the world, a serious investor loses time — and opportunity — because the intelligence they need simply does not exist in one place.

High-net-worth individuals, resort developers, land buyers, and entrepreneurs understand one truth better than anyone: time is worth more than capital. Capital can be raised again. Time cannot be recovered.

Yet before making a single major investment decision — a beachfront acquisition, a resort development, an island land play — they are forced to spend weeks doing something that should take hours. They reach out to local agents. They hire consultants. They dig through government portals, outdated PDFs, third-party databases, and contradictory reports from people with every incentive to mislead them.

The information exists. But it is scattered across dozens of sources, filtered through layers of bias, shaded by conflict of interest, or simply missing. By the time a picture forms, it is incomplete. By the time it is verified, the opportunity may already be gone.

The Real Cost

The risk is not just financial loss from a bad deal. The real cost is invisible: it is the deal that was never made. The acquisition never pursued. The development window that closed while due diligence stalled. Every week spent gathering fragmented, unreliable information is a week not spent building, investing, acquiring, or compounding wealth.

The world's most capable investors should not be spending weeks verifying basic facts. They should not be paying $20,000 to consultancies who take three months. They should not be guessing.

GeoLux AI Brings Together

Satellite Intelligence
Climate Intelligence
Economic Intelligence
Tourism Intelligence
Infrastructure Analysis
Investment Scoring

Thousands of data points synthesised into one clear intelligence report — delivered in 24 hours. Not six weeks. Not three months. One day.

The mission of GeoLux AI is precise: help serious decision-makers move faster, reduce uncertainty, and identify opportunities before everyone else. Not by simplifying the complexity — but by mastering it, so our clients do not have to.

"The world's most valuable asset isn't capital.
It's time."

GeoLux AI exists to give investors both.

Intelligence. Clarity. Confidence.

Everything You Need To Know

Common Questions About GeoLux AI Reports & Luxury Destination Intelligence

GeoLux Intelligence Reports are produced by a dedicated analyst team combining deep expertise in geospatial analysis, climate science, and luxury real estate finance. Each report is reviewed by a senior analyst before delivery. GeoLux was founded by Lalit Gangwar with a mission to bring institutional-grade intelligence to private investors and developers who have historically lacked access to this level of due diligence. Our analysts hold backgrounds in remote sensing, investment banking, environmental science, and real estate advisory.
Our reports draw from a curated stack of verified global datasets: NASA Earthdata and Copernicus satellite imagery for geospatial and terrain analysis; IPCC-validated climate models for 30–50 year projections; NOAA ocean data for sea-level and coastal risk assessment; World Bank economic and governance indicators; UN World Tourism Organization demand and arrival statistics; OpenStreetMap and government cadastral registries for parcel and legal title information; and proprietary comparable transaction databases built from 200+ luxury land deals across 40+ markets. Every data source used in your report is documented and referenced.
GeoLux reports are AI-assisted, not AI-generated. Our proprietary intelligence framework uses AI to process large datasets, identify patterns, and accelerate data synthesis — but every report is reviewed, validated, and refined by a human analyst before delivery. The investment verdicts, legal risk assessments, and strategic recommendations reflect genuine expert judgment. We use AI as a precision tool, not a replacement for expertise. Think of it as a Bloomberg terminal combined with a senior analyst — the data engine is automated, the interpretation is human.
We stand behind every report we deliver. If you find the intelligence does not meet the scope agreed at inquiry, or if specific data points require correction, contact us directly within 7 days of delivery and we will revise your report at no additional cost. For Premium-tier and Developer-tier clients, this includes a follow-up analyst call to address any questions or clarifications. We are committed to delivering intelligence that genuinely serves your investment decision — if it falls short of that standard, we will make it right.
Every GeoLux Intelligence Report delivers a comprehensive multi-layered analysis: satellite imagery interpretation, geospatial site assessment, 50-year climate risk matrix with sea-level rise projections, legal ownership pathway and title verification framework, tourism demand index and seasonality trends, ROI yield benchmarks from comparable luxury transactions, elevation and flood zone mapping, infrastructure connectivity scoring, and a Strategic Investment Verdict. Premium-tier reports additionally include a 30-minute private analyst briefing call with your dedicated intelligence officer.
Traditional real estate research is fragmented, jurisdiction-specific, and slow. GeoLux AI synthesizes satellite data, climate science, legal frameworks, economic indicators, and AI-enhanced scoring into a single institutional-grade document — covering 97+ destinations simultaneously. A comparable engagement with a top-tier advisory firm would take 6–12 weeks and cost $15,000–$40,000+. GeoLux delivers in 24 hours, starting at $1,479, with the same institutional-grade precision trusted by developers and private investors worldwide.
Yes. While our index features 97+ primary luxury destinations, our analysts regularly produce custom reports for any island, coastal, or luxury land location globally. Simply describe your target location in the private inquiry form. We'll confirm scope and feasibility within a few hours. No destination is too remote or niche for our intelligence framework — we have produced reports for undiscovered atolls, highland coastal parcels, and off-index island chains.
Our scoring models are built on verified datasets from NASA Earthdata, Copernicus Climate Service, UN Tourism Organization, and the World Bank. Investment scores are benchmarked against 200+ comparable luxury transactions. Climate projections follow IPCC-validated models with multi-decadal scenario modelling. Every data source is documented and disclosed within your report. While no projection is infallible, our accuracy methodology is fully transparent and subject to independent verification.
Standard Intelligence Reports are delivered within 24 hours of scope confirmation. Premium-tier reports with analyst briefing are delivered within 24–48 hours, with the private briefing scheduled within 72 hours. Rush delivery options are available for time-sensitive acquisition decisions — contact us directly for expedited processing. Reports are delivered as secure, high-resolution PDFs to your registered email address.
Absolutely. GeoLux operates under strict confidentiality protocols. We never share client identities, location interests, financial parameters, or investment activity with any third party — including brokers, agents, developers, or advisors. Every inquiry is handled exclusively by the GeoLux analyst assigned to your report and is protected under our client privacy agreement. Your intelligence remains your competitive advantage.
Yes — this is one of our most valued capabilities. GeoLux tracks early-stage infrastructure investment, tourism corridor development, and government concession activity across 90+ global markets. Our Emerging Destination Intelligence module surfaces high-potential locations 3–7 years before mainstream market recognition. Several GeoLux-identified destinations have since seen 200–400% land value appreciation. Early intelligence is the foundation of asymmetric returns in luxury real estate.
Yes. Resort and hospitality developers represent a significant segment of our client base. GeoLux produces specialized Resort Development Intelligence reports covering site feasibility, environmental clearance pathways, construction cost benchmarks, projected occupancy rates, brand positioning viability, and competitive landscape analysis. We have supported resort development decisions across Bali, the Maldives, the Caribbean, the Mediterranean, and Southeast Asian markets.
Yes. Our Comparative Destination Intelligence module delivers side-by-side analysis of 2–5 locations across 40+ data dimensions — including climate risk, ROI yield, legal complexity, infrastructure maturity, and tourism demand trajectory. This is particularly valuable for investors evaluating portfolio diversification or developers selecting between competing sites. Comparative reports are available as an add-on to any standard or custom Intelligence Report.
Our primary index covers 97+ destinations including the Maldives, Bali & Lombok, Seychelles, Mauritius, Phuket & Koh Samui, Saint Lucia, Barbados, Turks & Caicos, Sardinia, Corsica, Costa Rica, Panama, Sri Lanka, Zanzibar, Komodo, and emerging markets across Southeast Asia, the Indian Ocean, and the Caribbean. Custom Intelligence Reports are available for any global location beyond our standard index — no destination is out of scope.
Yes. Custom Intelligence Reports are available for any location globally — including off-market sites, undeveloped parcels, private island acquisitions, and non-standard land configurations. Custom reports follow the same institutional-grade methodology as our standard reports, with additional scope tailored to your specific due diligence requirements. Contact us through the private inquiry form to outline your location and investment parameters.
GeoLux AI reports are designed for resort developers evaluating site acquisitions, private villa investors conducting pre-purchase due diligence, luxury property brokers advising high-net-worth clients, hotel groups assessing expansion markets, family offices managing international real estate allocations, and sovereign wealth funds evaluating luxury destination land banks. If superior intelligence gives you a decisive advantage, GeoLux was built for you.

🛰Satellite Data Verified

📈Economic Data Verified
🤖AI Enhanced Analysis

Data sources include NASA Earthdata, Copernicus, UN Tourism, World Bank, OpenStreetMap, and other verified public intelligence datasets.

Transparency

Methodology & Data Sources

How we collect, verify, and transform data into actionable intelligence.

GeoLux AI draws from 32+ verified global institutions and platforms. Below are the primary sources and what each contributes to your report:

🛰️ NASA Earth ObservatoryMODIS & Landsat satellite imagery, sea surface temperature, coastal elevation (SRTM), 50-year historical archive
🌊 NOAAOcean temperature, sea-level rise projections, storm frequency data, tidal gauge readings
🇺🇳 IPCC AR6Climate risk baselines, flood and sea-level projections to 2050 and 2100, carbon pathway scenarios
🏦 World BankLegal ownership frameworks, Doing Business indicators, infrastructure development pipelines, economic indicators
🌐 UNWTOInternational tourist arrivals by destination, tourism receipts, 5-year demand forecasts
⚖️ Transparency InternationalCorruption Perceptions Index — used to score legal title reliability and dispute risk per jurisdiction
🛰️ Copernicus / ESASentinel-2 high-resolution satellite imagery, land cover mapping, vegetation and coastal change detection
✈️ OAG AviationScheduled flight routes, seat capacity, frequency data — used to score accessibility and connectivity
🏨 STR Global & AirbnbHotel occupancy rates, ADR, RevPAR trends, short-term rental demand by island destination
🌿 WWF & IUCNSpecies richness, reef health, protected zone boundaries, biodiversity threat assessments
🗺️ OpenStreetMap & EsriBase mapping, road and port infrastructure, parcel boundary intelligence, terrain analysis
💹 IMF & Trading EconomicsGDP growth, currency stability, foreign direct investment flows, macro-economic outlook per market

All sources are publicly verifiable institutions. GeoLux AI does not manufacture or estimate data — we synthesise, weight, and contextualise verified datasets into location-specific intelligence.

Reports use the most recent verified datasets available during report generation.

Every GeoLux location is scored on a 1–10 scale using the GeoLux Scoring Framework — a weighted composite of six independently verified intelligence vectors:

📈
Land Value Trajectory (25%)3–10 year appreciation forecast using comparable transaction data, tourism demand growth, and infrastructure development pipelines sourced from World Bank and national land registries.
🌊
Climate Risk Index (20%)8-vector risk model covering flood, sea-level rise, storm frequency, wildfire exposure, monsoon patterns, tidal encroachment, coral bleaching, and long-term temperature shift. Calibrated to IPCC AR6 baseline data and NOAA ocean datasets.
⚖️
Legal Ownership Clarity (20%)Assessment of foreign freehold rights, leasehold frameworks, title registration reliability, and dispute risk. Scored against World Bank Doing Business indicators and Transparency International's Corruption Perceptions Index.
🛰️
Infrastructure Access Score (15%)Airport connectivity (OAG Aviation), road and port access, grid power reliability, fibre/4G availability (Speedtest Global Index), and healthcare proximity (WHO Health Index).
🌐
Tourism Demand Index (10%)International arrivals trend, UNWTO forecasts, short-term rental occupancy (STR Hotel Data, Airbnb market data), and search-demand trajectory across top source markets.
🌿
Biodiversity & Eco-Tourism Potential (10%)Marine, avian, and terrestrial species richness, UNESCO and protected-area status, reef health, and eco-lodge demand signals. Sourced from WWF Conservation Data, FAO Land Data, and IUCN Red List.

All six vectors are independently weighted and aggregated into a single composite score. Scores above 9.0 represent destinations with exceptional multi-vector alignment. Scores are recalibrated when new verified data becomes available.

Major indicators include source references where applicable, allowing independent verification.

Common Questions

Everything You Need to Know

What exactly is in a GeoLux Intelligence Report?
Every report includes: satellite imagery analysis, 50-year climate risk matrix, legal title and ownership pathway assessment, tourism demand index and trajectory, ROI yield benchmarks from comparable transactions, elevation and flood zone mapping, and a strategic investment verdict. Premium tier adds a 30-minute private analyst briefing call.
How is this different from hiring a local lawyer or consultant?
Local consultants typically cover legal structure only — and only in their jurisdiction. GeoLux combines satellite data, climate science, institutional market intelligence, and legal frameworks across 97+ destinations in a single 24-hour report. A comparable engagement with a top-tier advisory firm would take 6–12 weeks and cost $15,000–$40,000+. We start at $1,479.
How do I receive my report?
Reports are delivered as a secure, high-resolution PDF to your registered email address within 24 hours of scope confirmation. Premium tier clients also receive a calendar invite for their private analyst briefing within 48 hours.
Is my location and investment interest kept confidential?
Absolutely. GeoLux operates under strict confidentiality. We never share client information, location interests, or investment activity with brokers, agents, or any third parties. Your inquiry is seen only by the GeoLux analyst assigned to your report.
Can you cover any location, or only the ones listed?
We can produce reports for virtually any island or coastal luxury land location globally. Our index covers 97+ primary destinations, but our analysts work with custom locations regularly. If your site isn't listed, simply describe it in the request form and we'll confirm scope within a few hours.
What if I'm not satisfied with the report?
If your report doesn't meet the scope we agreed, we'll revise it at no charge. We stand behind the quality of every intelligence file we deliver — our analysts review every report before it leaves our hands.

Which Destination Matches Your Personality?

5 quick questions. Our AI matches you to the world's most fitting paradise based on your travel personality.

Question 1 of 5
Your ideal Saturday morning looks like…
🌊 Coffee on a private beach watching the sunrise
🏔️ Hiking to a summit before breakfast
🏛️ Wandering a morning market in an ancient city
☕ Working from a rooftop café with a city view
Question 2 of 5
Your travel photo style is…
💎 Cinematic overwater villa golden hour
🧗 Action shots mid-dive or cliff jumping
🗺️ Hidden places nobody else has discovered
🌃 Moody city nights and street life
Question 3 of 5
Your biggest travel priority is…
🛁 World-class comfort and luxury service
🌿 Untouched nature and zero crowds
📚 Deeply understanding local culture
💰 Maximum experience for minimum spend
Question 4 of 5
You're happiest when you're…
🤿 Under crystal-clear water exploring marine life
🥂 Watching sunset from a cliffside with someone special
🗺️ Discovering places nobody else has been
🎶 Dancing at an open-air beach bar until sunrise
Question 5 of 5
Your dream travel companion is…
💑 My partner — make it romantic and magical
🧍 Solo — total freedom and self-discovery
👫 Close friends — adventure and good vibes
👨‍👩‍👧 Family — safe, enriching, everyone's happy
